archetype: Archetype 4/5 Hybrid (Swiss & High-Contrast with Industrial Streetwear Aesthetics)
vibe: Underground, bold, confident, premium, dark, urban.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase

rules: Headings MUST use Unbounded and tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
Use ALL CAPS for major section headers and call-to-actions to enforce the streetwear brand identity.
Body text MUST use IBM Plex Sans for ultimate legibility, especially in the dense ERP dashboard.
Never use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk.
The UI is primarily monochromatic (Black, Dark Gray, White).
Safety Orange (#FF3B30) is the ONLY accent color. Use it sparingly for primary CTAs (Add to Cart, Checkout, Login) and critical data points in the ERP (Low Stock Alerts).
Never use generic blue, purple, or full-screen gradients.
Never use pure black (#000000); use Zinc-950 (#09090B) for depth.
Use generous padding (py-24, py-32) for sections.
Embrace asymmetry. Offset product images from text blocks.
Use full-bleed images for hero and category headers.
Dense data layout. Use tighter padding (p-4, p-6).
Use subtle borders (border-zinc-800) instead of heavy shadows.
Ensure tables have sticky headers and horizontal scrolling.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#D92D23] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-white hover:border-white uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-900 rounded-none px-4 py-2

cards.product: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800/50 hover:border-zinc-600 transition-colors group
cards.dashboard_kpi: bg-zinc-900/40 border border-zinc-800 p-6 rounded-sm flex flex-col justify-between

forms.input: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 text-white rounded-none focus:border-[#FF3B30] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF3B30]
forms.label: text-sm font-medium text-zinc-300 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2

shadcn_overrides.general: Remove all rounded corners (rounded-md -> rounded-none or rounded-sm) to match the brutalist/industrial theme.
shadcn_overrides.tables: Use minimal borders. Hover states on rows should be bg-zinc-900.
shadcn_overrides.tabs: Use border-bottom style tabs instead of pills for a more editorial look.
shadcn_overrides.dialog: Backdrop should be backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80. Dialog box bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800.

micro_animations.product_card: On hover, slightly scale the image (scale-105) with a slow ease-out transition (duration-500).
micro_animations.buttons: Primary buttons should have a slight background color shift and a subtle translate-y (translate-y-[-1px]) on hover.
micro_animations.page_load: Fade in content slightly from bottom (translate-y-4 to translate-y-0 opacity-0 to opacity-100).
micro_animations.marquee: Use a slow-moving marquee for brand slogans ('STREETWEAR EST. 2026 // BOLD & EDGY') in the footer or between sections.

image_urls.description: Young black man wearing a vest - Perfect for main hero banner with text overlay.
Young man leaning on car - Good for 'Featured Drops' section.
Folded t-shirts flat lay - Ideal for product catalog or category banners.
Black t-shirts on wooden hanger - Ideal for product thumbnails.
Dark empty concrete parking garage - Use as a backdrop overlay with bg-black/80 for the auth page or specific CTA sections.
Graffiti-covered pillar - Perfect raw urban aesthetic for the 'About the Brand' section.
Empty dark warehouse with light streak. Good for full-bleed Google OAuth login screen.

accessibility_and_testing: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio. Text on Safety Orange (#FF3B30) must be pure white.
All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="add-to-cart-btn"`).
instructions_to_main_agent: Install Unbounded and IBM Plex Sans from Google Fonts.
Implement the ERP Dashboard layout using a fixed sidebar with dark zinc tones and subtle borders. Do not use heavy box-shadows.
Implement the Customer Storefront with large, immersive sections. Overlay text over hero images must use a dark gradient or scrim (bg-black/50) to ensure readability.
Apply rounded-none across all components (buttons, inputs, cards) to establish the harsh, industrial aesthetic.
For the storefront, integrate a sliding cart drawer rather than a separate cart page.
For the ERP, implement dense, data-rich tables (Shadcn Table) with horizontal scrolling for inventory management.
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide icons with sharp/straight edges where possible.
